CustomField.formula: IF ( OR( AND( IssueDate1__c < TODAY() , NOT(TEXT(Alart1__c) = "承諾済み" )), AND( ApproveDate1__c < TODAY() , NOT(TEXT(Alart2__c) = "承諾済み") ) , AND( CarryingDate1__c < TODAY() , OR(Alart01__c = false, NOT(TEXT(Alart3__c) = "承諾済み"))) , AND( OnSiteWitness1__c < TODAY() , NOT(TEXT(Alart5__c) = "承諾済み")) , AND( OnSiteWitnessPlanningDate1__c < TODAY() , OR( NOT(TEXT(Alart6__c) = "承諾済み") , Alart03__c = false) ) ), "期限切れ", null )
CustomField.label: 期限後アラーム
